name: ledger-wallet-cli
description: Codex JSON harness for the official @ledgerhq/wallet-cli command contract.

interface.shortDescription: Run wallet-cli flows with Codex-friendly JSON parsing.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex instructions and a local harness for the official @ledgerhq/wallet-cli 1.0.2 contract: JSON output parsing, strict flag handling, dry-run-first send guidance, and a clear separation from AgenC DMK/BLE marketplace flows. The harness preserves the wallet-cli command surface instead of substituting AgenC for personal wallet-cli operations. This is an independent local plugin and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Ledger.
